gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students, who clutch resumes inside branded folders, line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, with career counselors reminding attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; a welcome announcement outlining the fair schedule is given over the PA system, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; furthermore, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps alongside dozens of booths with colorful banners that circle the polished floor, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps alongside dozens of booths with colorful banners that circle the polished floor, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
